app_description: E2EE Chat is a platform for secure and private chat.

sidebar.conversation1LastMessage: The keys are rotated and ready...

chat.encryptedTooltip: Only you and the recipient can read these messages
chat.enterPrivateKeyPlaceholder: Paste your private key (JWK JSON) here to send encrypted messages
chat.enterSeedPhrasePlaceholder: Enter your 12-word seed phrase (space separated) to restore your key
chat.sendNeedRecipientKey: Need recipient's public key to send
chat.message1Content: I've updated the deployment manifest with the new encryption keys. We should be good for the production push.
chat.message2Content: Confirmed. Running the final validation now. Have we verified the hardware modules?
chat.message3Content: Yes, the HSMs are reporting 100% health. Ready when you are.

gatewayAuth.title: Gateway Authentication
gatewayAuth.subtitle: Complete the identity verification and cryptographic handshake to initialize your secure session.
gatewayAuth.e2eRequiredDesc: Without your unique 24-word recovery phrase, previous conversations will remain cryptographically inaccessible.
gatewayAuth.secretPhrasePlaceholder: Paste your 24-word recovery phrase or drag key file here...
gatewayAuth.storeSessionLabel: Store session key in secure browser enclave for 30 days.
gatewayAuth.footerCopyright: AES-256-GCM + Ed25519 Signatures. © 2024 Enterprise Secure Infrastructure.
